---
title: "Get Learn Bioinformatics"
image: img/profile.png

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:info.getlearnbioinformatics@gmail.com

    - icon: facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/getlearnbioinformatics
      target: _blank

    - text: "FB Group"
      href: https://facebook.com/groups/934011292608963/
      target: _blank

    - icon: youtube
      href: https://youtube.com/@getlearn_bioinformatics
      target: _blank

    - icon: instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/bio.info_shikhbo
      target: _blank
---

::: {#hero-heading}
<div style="text-align: justify;">

**About** [Get Learn Bioinformatics](https://www.facebook.com/getlearnbioinformatics) 

**Who We Are:**
We are a research and education-focused platform dedicated to making bioinformatics and computational biology accessible for students, beginners, and aspiring researchers.

**What We Do:**
Provide hands-on training in bioinformatics tools and molecular visualization
Guide learners through research methodology and scientific literature analysis
Offer workshops, mentorship, and academic support for research projects

**Our Mission:**
To empower learners with practical skills and confidence to explore, analyze, and contribute to scientific research.

**Our Vision:**
To create a community where students and researchers can grow, innovate, and succeed in bioinformatics and computational biology.

**Learn. Explore. Research. Grow.**

</div>
:::
